summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of SocialFUX (backend + frontend). Backend: 30/30 pytest tests passed (auth, dashboard, customers CRUD + logo upload, news-sources CRUD + graceful fetch, news-items import-url with dedupe + filter, generator content/hashtags/compliance/CRUD, creatives CRUD with preview_html + export-png 501, templates CRUD + seeded 3, settings). Frontend: Login → Dashboard → all 8 nav routes working, no console errors. Customers new-modal + detail tabs open. Content Generator produced real Claude Sonnet 4.5 output (title 'Update von TuningFux Demo…', body 259 chars, hashtags rendered). Compliance panel returns issues for 'DPF off' phrase. Live Creative Editor preview updates in real-time with headline/subline/CTA; save + PNG export show graceful 501 toast. Archive shows saved content (6 items). Seeded 7 news sources and 3 templates render correctly. Design: dark automotive aesthetic with #B4E600 lime accents intact, Rajdhani/IBM Plex typography visible, no contrast issues observed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); FastAPI recommends the lifespan context manager. Not breaking, but should be migrated.

CORS: allow_origins is derived from CORS_ORIGINS env with default '*' AND allow_credentials=True — browsers reject wildcard+credentials. Currently OK since preview host also serves the frontend, but tighten origins before production.
JWT_SECRET committed to backend/.env contains a placeholder value; rotate before production and move to a secret manager.
Frontend does not appear to handle 401 refresh globally — if a token expires mid-session the user is silently blocked. Consider an axios interceptor that redirects to /login on 401.
ContentGenerator: title/body are unlabeled inputs (no <label htmlFor>), minor a11y concern.
Uploads directory is served at /uploads with no auth — logo files uploaded by any tenant are publicly discoverable if the URL is known. Acceptable for MVP but note for hardening.
seed_data_creation: During testing a customer 'TEST UI Customer' was created via UI and left behind (has an uploaded 1x1 PNG logo may remain). All TEST_-prefixed customers/sources/templates from pytest were cleaned up. One imported news_item from auto-motor-und-sport.de and ~6 generated_content records remain.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite is at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (parallel-safe, 30 tests, uses TEST_ prefix). Rerun with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Note: gen-result-title/body are <input>/<textarea> — read via page.input_value(), not text_content. Generator returns HTTP 201 (not 200). Hashtag endpoint expects {'text','count'} not {'topic'}. Creative export-png returns 501 by design (Playwright not installed in preview env). Seed customer 'TuningFux Demo' + 7 news-sources + 3 templates always present after backend restart.
rca of the issue: N/A - no issues found requiring RCA.
